scripts.compile:macos: bun run build:frontend && bun build packages/backend/src/index.ts packages/backend/drizzle/migrations/*.sql packages/backend/drizzle/migrations_pg/*.sql packages/frontend/dist/*.png packages/frontend/dist/*.ico packages/frontend/dist/*.svg packages/frontend/dist/*.webmanifest --compile --asset-naming="[name].[ext]" --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile plexus-macos
scripts.compile:linux: bun run build:frontend && bun build packages/backend/src/index.ts packages/backend/drizzle/migrations/*.sql packages/backend/drizzle/migrations_pg/*.sql packages/frontend/dist/*.png packages/frontend/dist/*.ico packages/frontend/dist/*.svg packages/frontend/dist/*.webmanifest --compile --asset-naming="[name].[ext]" --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile plexus-linux
scripts.compile:windows: bun run build:frontend && bun build packages/backend/src/index.ts packages/backend/drizzle/migrations/*.sql packages/backend/drizzle/migrations_pg/*.sql packages/frontend/dist/*.png packages/frontend/dist/*.ico packages/frontend/dist/*.svg packages/frontend/dist/*.webmanifest --compile --asset-naming="[name].[ext]" --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile plexus.exe
scripts.build:bin: bun run build:frontend && bun build packages/backend/src/index.ts packages/backend/drizzle/migrations/*.sql packages/backend/drizzle/migrations_pg/*.sql packages/frontend/dist/*.png packages/frontend/dist/*.ico packages/frontend/dist/*.svg packages/frontend/dist/*.webmanifest --compile --asset-naming="[name].[ext]" --outfile plexus
scripts.install:all: bun install && (cd packages/backend && bun install) && (cd packages/frontend && bun install)
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
